TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Aljungic, title = Aljungic, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Aljungic} }

S.FORM: alang Aljungic ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taznin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 332 buwan, 732 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 85% kyan ku 625 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 15% kyan ku 107 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 78%, Amis 2%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Aljungic hya' ga Mulinaga. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. psatu tegami maki 1 psatu tegami. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Aljungic ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taznin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 332 buwan, 732 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 85% kyan ku 625 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 15% kyan ku 107 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 78%, Amis 2%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Aljungic hya' ga Mulinaga. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. psatu tegami maki 1 psatu tegami. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ aljuŋiʦ~ʨ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu taznin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkjaħuʔ na aljuŋiʦ~ʨ ħjaʔ ɣa mulinaɣa. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. ps~ɕatu teɣami maki * ps~ɕatu teɣami. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
